fix_patch:
diff --git c/.github/workflows/ci.yml i/.github/workflows/ci.yml
index a867a6e105..c47865ce94 100644
--- c/.github/workflows/ci.yml
+++ i/.github/workflows/ci.yml
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ env:
   RUSTUP_WINDOWS_PATH_ADD_BIN: 1
   # Change to specific Rust release to pin
   rust_stable: stable
-  rust_nightly: nightly-2024-05-05
+  rust_nightly: nightly-2024-05-19
   # Pin a specific miri version
   rust_miri_nightly: nightly-2024-10-21
   rust_clippy: '1.77'
@@ -1096,12 +1096,12 @@ jobs:
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
           toolchain: ${{ env.rust_nightly }}
-      - name: don't allow warnings
-        run: sed -i '/#!\[allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)\]/d' */src/lib.rs */tests/*.rs
+      - name: don't allow warnings in tests
+        run: sed -i '/#!\[allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)\]/d' */tests/*.rs
       - name: check for unknown lints and cfgs
         run: cargo check --all-features --tests
         env:
-          RUSTFLAGS: -Dwarnings --check-cfg=cfg(loom,tokio_unstable,tokio_taskdump,fuzzing,mio_unsupported_force_poll_poll,tokio_internal_mt_counters,fs,tokio_no_parking_lot,tokio_no_tuning_tests) -Funexpected_cfgs -Funknown_lints
+          RUSTFLAGS: -Dwarnings -Funexpected_cfgs -Funknown_lints
 
   check-fuzzing:
     name: check-fuzzing
diff --git c/examples/Cargo.toml i/examples/Cargo.toml
index 54f2ecb8a4..b6cf2f94d3 100644
--- c/examples/Cargo.toml
+++ i/examples/Cargo.toml
@@ -5,6 +5,12 @@ publish = false
 edition = "2021"
 license = "MIT"
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = [
+  'cfg(tokio_taskdump)',
+  'cfg(tokio_unstable)',
+] }
+
 # If you copy one of the examples into a new project, you should be using
 # [dependencies] instead, and delete the **path**.
 [dev-dependencies]
diff --git c/examples/dump.rs i/examples/dump.rs
index 6f744713f7..c7ece458ff 100644
--- c/examples/dump.rs
+++ i/examples/dump.rs
@@ -1,5 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
-
 //! This example demonstrates tokio's experimental task dumping functionality.
 //! This application deadlocks. Input CTRL+C to display traces of each task, or
 //! input CTRL+C twice within 1 second to quit.
diff --git c/tokio-macros/Cargo.toml i/tokio-macros/Cargo.toml
index e47e411604..199c629561 100644
--- c/tokio-macros/Cargo.toml
+++ i/tokio-macros/Cargo.toml
@@ -16,6 +16,9 @@ Tokio's proc macros.
 """
 categories = ["asynchronous"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ['cfg(tokio_unstable)'] }
+
 [lib]
 proc-macro = true
 
diff --git c/tokio-macros/src/lib.rs i/tokio-macros/src/lib.rs
index 29ea2867cf..32353b3807 100644
--- c/tokio-macros/src/lib.rs
+++ i/tokio-macros/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 #![allow(clippy::needless_doctest_main)]
 #![warn(
     missing_debug_implementations,
@@ -211,7 +210,6 @@ use proc_macro::TokenStream;
 /// This option is only compatible with the `current_thread` runtime.
 ///
 /// ```no_run
-/// # #![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 /// #[cfg(tokio_unstable)]
 /// #[tokio::main(flavor = "current_thread", unhandled_panic = "shutdown_runtime")]
 /// async fn main() {
@@ -226,7 +224,6 @@ use proc_macro::TokenStream;
 /// Equivalent code not using `#[tokio::main]`
 ///
 /// ```no_run
-/// # #![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 /// #[cfg(tokio_unstable)]
 /// fn main() {
 ///     tokio::runtime::Builder::new_current_thread()
@@ -480,7 +477,6 @@ pub fn main_rt(args: TokenStream, item: TokenStream) -> TokenStream {
 /// This option is only compatible with the `current_thread` runtime.
 ///
 /// ```no_run
-/// # #![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 /// #[cfg(tokio_unstable)]
 /// #[tokio::test(flavor = "current_thread", unhandled_panic = "shutdown_runtime")]
 /// async fn my_test() {
@@ -495,7 +491,6 @@ pub fn main_rt(args: TokenStream, item: TokenStream) -> TokenStream {
 /// Equivalent code not using `#[tokio::test]`
 ///
 /// ```no_run
-/// # #![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 /// #[cfg(tokio_unstable)]
 /// #[test]
 /// fn my_test() {
diff --git c/tokio-stream/Cargo.toml i/tokio-stream/Cargo.toml
index 81d9b9d202..0223f90150 100644
--- c/tokio-stream/Cargo.toml
+++ i/tokio-stream/Cargo.toml
@@ -16,6 +16,12 @@ Utilities to work with `Stream` and `tokio`.
 """
 categories = ["asynchronous"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = [
+    'cfg(docsrs)',
+    'cfg(loom)',
+] }
+
 [features]
 default = ["time"]
 
diff --git c/tokio-stream/src/lib.rs i/tokio-stream/src/lib.rs
index f2b463bcb9..28fa22a2ff 100644
--- c/tokio-stream/src/lib.rs
+++ i/tokio-stream/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 #![allow(
     clippy::cognitive_complexity,
     clippy::large_enum_variant,
diff --git c/tokio-test/Cargo.toml i/tokio-test/Cargo.toml
index 536c5a848e..63f6659d78 100644
--- c/tokio-test/Cargo.toml
+++ i/tokio-test/Cargo.toml
@@ -16,6 +16,9 @@ Testing utilities for Tokio- and futures-based code
 """
 categories = ["asynchronous", "development-tools::testing"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = ['cfg(loom)'] }
+
 [dependencies]
 tokio = { version = "1.2.0", path = "../tokio", features = ["rt", "sync", "time", "test-util"] }
 tokio-stream = { version = "0.1.1", path = "../tokio-stream" }
diff --git c/tokio-test/src/lib.rs i/tokio-test/src/lib.rs
index 9f60faf795..87e6386121 100644
--- c/tokio-test/src/lib.rs
+++ i/tokio-test/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 #![warn(
     missing_debug_implementations,
     missing_docs,
diff --git c/tokio-util/Cargo.toml i/tokio-util/Cargo.toml
index d215590d9f..ea6885e316 100644
--- c/tokio-util/Cargo.toml
+++ i/tokio-util/Cargo.toml
@@ -16,6 +16,13 @@ Additional utilities for working with Tokio.
 """
 categories = ["asynchronous"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = [
+  'cfg(docsrs)',
+  'cfg(loom)',
+  'cfg(tokio_unstable)',
+] }
+
 [features]
 # No features on by default
 default = []
diff --git c/tokio-util/src/lib.rs i/tokio-util/src/lib.rs
index 34f69fd14e..1df4de1b45 100644
--- c/tokio-util/src/lib.rs
+++ i/tokio-util/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 #![allow(clippy::needless_doctest_main)]
 #![warn(
     missing_debug_implementations,
diff --git c/tokio/Cargo.toml i/tokio/Cargo.toml
index 8601787168..fef1eddf90 100644
--- c/tokio/Cargo.toml
+++ i/tokio/Cargo.toml
@@ -21,6 +21,20 @@ backed applications.
 categories = ["asynchronous", "network-programming"]
 keywords = ["io", "async", "non-blocking", "futures"]
 
+[lints.rust]
+unexpected_cfgs = { level = "warn", check-cfg = [
+  'cfg(docsrs)',
+  'cfg(fs)',
+  'cfg(fuzzing)',
+  'cfg(loom)',
+  'cfg(mio_unsupported_force_poll_poll)',
+  'cfg(tokio_internal_mt_counters)',
+  'cfg(tokio_no_parking_lot)',
+  'cfg(tokio_no_tuning_tests)',
+  'cfg(tokio_taskdump)',
+  'cfg(tokio_unstable)',
+] }
+
 [features]
 # Include nothing by default
 default = []
diff --git c/tokio/src/lib.rs i/tokio/src/lib.rs
index b85921f31d..a69def9363 100644
--- c/tokio/src/lib.rs
+++ i/tokio/src/lib.rs
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-#![allow(unknown_lints, unexpected_cfgs)]
 #![allow(
     clippy::cognitive_complexity,
     clippy::large_enum_variant,
